seoTitle: Sun Valley vs Sunset Strip — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sun Valley and Sunset Strip. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sun Valley vs Sunset Strip: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sun Valley and Sunset Strip.
heading: Sun Valley vs Sunset Strip — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sun Valley, New South Wales and Sunset Strip, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunset Strip has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Sun Valley (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sun Valley or Sunset Strip safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sun Valley has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Sunset Strip scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sun Valley scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Sunset Strip scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sun Valley or Sunset Strip?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunset Strip has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
